description: Entity types for Amazon SES (Simple Email Service) resources including configuration sets, verified identities, receipt rule sets, and email templates.

entityTypes.description: An Amazon SES configuration set — a group of rules applied to sent emails for tracking, filtering, and event publishing.
A verified Amazon SES identity — an email address or domain that has been verified for sending email.
An Amazon SES receipt rule set — an ordered collection of receipt rules that define how to handle incoming email for verified domains.
An Amazon SES email template used for sending personalized bulk email with dynamic substitution variables.
